name: gitbook
description: Reads 185 GitBook REST resources and executes 170 JSON/no-body GitBook mutations through the GitBook API.

risk.read: external GitBook API reads across users, organizations, spaces, sites, content, permissions, integrations, analytics, search, and related resources
risk.write: creates, updates, publishes, archives, deletes, imports, exports, invites, permission changes, and content changes in GitBook depending on the selected write action
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token before execution
